title: Warmly Decorated
description: How about adding some decorations or fantastic gadgets to your world? This is what the "Warmly Decoration" mod brings to you!
body:
# English
## 🎇 Brief introduction
Warmly Decorated modules are specially designed for building players! It includes chairs, tables, cabinets, lamps, appliances, etc. If you need to add anything, feel free to contact me! (Contact information at the end)

If you need to make a modpack, then you are free to install it in your modpack

Native support language English | Chinese Simplified (China)
Other languages can use the provided language pack.
[OneDrive Link](https://1drv.ms/u/c/6311a700bd4832cc/EeBFcmyRgTtJoNe9e-LHyYMBDnmnHNdRuSXdobld0ZUmFA?e=eMPEFk)

## ⁉️ Some questions
### Will there be other versions updated?
- Current update plans Forge 1.16 ~ 1.20 / Fabric update paused / NeoForge 1.20 ~ 1.21
- Now, all versions (except Fabric) will be updated to the same development progress as the mods.
### Won't the Fabric version be updated?
-  Currently, there are no plans to update to Fabric, because porting it to Fabric is almost equivalent to redeveloping it.
- However, once the new content is basically completed, the Fabric update will begin.

My Email: DSCHX7@outlook.com

# 简体中文
## 🎇 简介
Warmly Decorated 模组专为建筑玩家所准备!加入了椅子、桌子、橱柜、灯、电器等，如果您需要添加什么，欢迎联系我！(联系方式在结尾)

如果你需要制作模组包,那么你可以自由的将其安装在你的模组包中

原生支持语言 English | 简体中文 (中国)
其他语言可使用提供的语言包
[OneDrive 链接](https://1drv.ms/u/c/6311a700bd4832cc/EeBFcmyRgTtJoNe9e-LHyYMBDnmnHNdRuSXdobld0ZUmFA?e=eMPEFk)
 
## ⁉️ 一些问题
### 是否会更新其他版本？
- 目前更新计划 Forge 1.16 ~ 1.20 / Fabric 暂停更新 / NeoForge 1.20 ~ 1.21
- 现在,会将所有版本(除Fabric外的Mod开发进度齐平)
### Fabric 版本不更新了吗?
- 目前没有计划更新到 Fabric，因为将其移植到 Fabric 几乎等于重新开发
- 但是新内容基本开发完毕后会开始 Fabric 更新

作者邮箱: DSCHX7@outlook.com
